positioning.headline: Hire AI operators that do the work and return proof.
positioning.subheadline: Grid Workers are specialized AI operators with memory, tools, safe autonomy, and receipt-backed execution.
positioning.contrast: Chatbots answer. Generic workers claim. Grid operators prove.

autonomy_levels.name: Chat only
autonomy_levels.description: Answers and drafts; no tool writes.

autonomy_levels.name: Internal research
autonomy_levels.description: Reads approved sources and produces internal reports.

autonomy_levels.name: Internal write
autonomy_levels.description: Updates files, dashboards, and internal state with receipts.

autonomy_levels.name: External draft
autonomy_levels.description: Prepares public/client actions for human approval.

autonomy_levels.name: Approved external execute
autonomy_levels.description: Sends or updates approved channels with readback proof.

autonomy_levels.name: High-risk gated execute
autonomy_levels.description: Money, legal, credentials, deploys, calls, or public posts require scoped approval and dual receipts.

workers.name: MADDIE
workers.title: Event Planner
workers.promise: Keeps event planning moving across clients, vendors, and dashboards.

workers.name: LORA
workers.title: Creative / Social / Crypto Art Scout
workers.promise: Finds, studies, curates, posts, and reports cultural signal without unsafe market actions.

workers.name: RAM
workers.title: Finance / Burn / Accounting Operator
workers.promise: Turns spend, revenue, purchasing, and accounting risk into controlled operating lanes.

workers.name: CLU
workers.title: Communications Operator
workers.promise: Routes messages, triages inboxes, coordinates voice/text, and prevents communication drift.

workers.name: BECK
workers.title: Grid Doctor / Reliability Operator
workers.promise: Watches the system, diagnoses failures, and prepares safe repairs.

workers.name: DUMONT
workers.title: Infrastructure / API / Credential Operator
workers.promise: Handles infrastructure, APIs, credentials, deployment evidence, and signer-lane readiness with strict gates.
